title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding, is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, proven experience scaling revenue operations beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer role building flows, dashboards, and data models while collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps and proven expertise in Salesforce, pipeline forecasting, and scaling revenue operations align perfectly with Finout's $85M+ funded growth stage and $30M+ ARR scaling needs. The Tel Aviv/New York hybrid structure matches his location preferences and the Head of Revenue Operations seniority level is his target role.
ai_opener: Omri here – I've spent 15 years building revenue operations engines in high-growth B2B SaaS companies, with particular focus on scaling Salesforce architectures and data models as ARR scaled past $30M. Finout's cloud cost management positioning in a rapidly consolidating space caught my attention, and I'd be interested in exploring how a hands-on RevOps leader could accelerate your path to the next growth inflection point.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Render, a modern developer cloud platform for AI-native, full-stack applications, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations. The role requires 8–12 years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM Operations, ideally at a B2B SaaS company with a PLG motion layered with enterprise sales. Candidates should have proven experience building RevOps infrastructure from the ground up. The role focuses on architecting the operational backbone of Render's go-to-market engine as the company scales its developer-first cloud platform.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment: 15+ years exceeds 8-12 year requirement, AI-native GTM expertise directly matches Render's platform focus, and proven RevOps infrastructure building from ground up is core to the role. Remote location is perfect fit.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Render's mission to democratize AI-native application development, and your background architecting RevOps infrastructure for scaling B2B SaaS companies is exactly what they need as they layer enterprise sales onto their developer-first PLG motion. With 15+ years building GTM engines and deep experience in AI-native platforms, you'd be the operational architect Render needs to scale their go-to-market engine.

title: RevOps Manager

Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, Marketing Ops, or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, APIs, workflow building), and hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred). A builder role architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes.

Slight gap: Instrumentl is early-stage nonprofit SaaS vs. typical fintech/enterprise focus, but the builder mindset and technical depth (SQL, APIs, workflows) map perfectly to their needs.

Your need for someone who can own the CRM data model, integrate disparate sources, and implement AI-driven sales workflows aligns with how I've built GTM engines from the ground up. I'd be interested in exploring how my experience scaling RevOps at similar-stage companies could accelerate your path to efficient, predictable revenue.
